blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
